573.name: University Morgue
573.description: The room has an unnatural chill, cool though not unpleasant. Cold stone slabs hold the shrouded corpses of brave adventurers and regular citizens alike. Curiously, the mortician has taken to filling the place with various plants, perhaps to give the room some much needed life.

npcs.name: Chrr'une
npcs.description: see right through.  He does seem to light up a little as he cares for his plants, but at work he's as sallow as the cadaver before him.

576.name: Hall of Experimental Magics
576.description: This place looks like a dim workshop, but the numerous devices balanced on floating marble tabletops are of unimaginable function. The floor is made of stone so dark, you seem to walk on shadow. Sizzling flashes of light occasionally burst in front of a busy student.

npcs.name: Xrymghanus
npcs.description: in one direction as if permanently blown to the side.  He wouldn't bring it up, but he rather enjoys when students think to call him Doctor X.

577.name: Enchantment Studies
577.description: What was once a standard lecture hall has been transformed by years of accumulated curiosities. Mismatched objects crowd the windowsills and a crooked bookshelf: a tarnished candelabra, a stopped clock, a brass compass with no needle. Students hunch over worn desks, carefully dismantling old rings and amulets under their instructor's watchful eye. A faded sign near the chalkboard reads "Listen Before You Layer" in careful script.

npcs.name: Archivist Sylene Drath
npcs.description: green eyes carrying the distant look of someone perpetually listening to things others cannot hear.  Faint traces of old ink stain her fingertips, and a slim chain around her neck holds a cracked gemstone she touches often, absently, while explaining the nature of magic bound to matter.

578.name: University Hall East
578.description: A hallway of widely spaced doors on its north wall curves away east and south from the main hall. The echo of voices and footsteps reverberates from an unclear distance. Light from high-placed windows glints on one particular door of surprising overcomplexity.

579.name: Thieves' Workshop
579.description: It seems J'rel has found a more reputable place in society for those drawn to the thief trade. The dextrous fingers of students construct fascinating gadgets, large and small; one of the more impressive projects rumbles deeply in the corner. A sewn hide punching bag on one wall is full of knife holes: old habits die hard. The door from this side is curiously smooth.

npcs.name: Miss Aelae
npcs.description: dark hair will be shortly followed by a stinging punishment from her

580.name: University Hall East
580.description: Polished stone floors and dark wood panelling reflect the glare from high placed windows giving this constantly curving hallway a hazy glow. Closed doors fail to contain the voices of the speakers in adjacent lecture halls.

567.name: University Courtyard
567.description: Standing in this courtyard feels like nothing so much as being in a deep hole. Rock masonry rises on all sides and strong voices from numerous evenly set windows reverberate around you. A wide doorway lies up a short flight of steps across the way, and a few wooden trapdoors set in stone must lead vaguely downward. A plaque on a short pedestal stands at the center.

568.name: A Domed Entrance Hall
568.description: This appears to be the hub of activity for the University. A high domed ceiling is ribbed with burnished metal splines and disjointed pieces of conversation echo and are amplified strangely. The walls are formed by tall panels of dark knurled wood. Tall arched hallways run east and westward while an imposing staircase winds around the circumference of the room as it climbs up and out of sight.

npcs.name: Dean
npcs.description: A proudly long and pointed nose sets off well-defined features that have just begun to show wrinkles.  Nonetheless, she knows how to keep people in

npcs.name: Mougie
npcs.description: of a soldier's polearm, occasionally apologizing as he knocks a student

569.name: University Hall West
569.description: Dark panels of finely finished wood with decoratively carved borders rise and arch over you, tiled down the hall as it curves in a very gradual circle away from the hall to the east. Windows placed high on the inside of the curve cast only diffuse shadows and doors line the opposite wall at even, if very wide, intervals.

570.name: The Gymnasium
570.description: One, two! One, two! A large group of students practice their combat forms in time with dulled weapons while others in light clothing run laps or play a team game with a hide-wrapped ball. The room is a large wooden chamber with bright sconces high on the walls and racks of fighting and sporting equipment along the walls.

npcs.name: Brom Lofton
npcs.description: swordsman with the agility of an archer.  He knows thirteen different fighting styles and can paddle the bay in ten minutes flat.

571.name: A Short Hallway
571.description: A short hallway seems only to serve as an entry to a pair of doors to the east and west. At its end, a portrait of a robed figure edged in crackling lightning stands upon a rocky precipice. Tongues of purple flame along the walls flicker in mid-air just out of reach.

572.name: Half-Elven Anatomy 101
572.description: Students in white lab coats crowd around their professor, gawking as he begins the first incision on the autopsy of a medical cadaver. Everything is neat and clean, and the whole place seems sterile. Your very presence is likely making everything else dirtier just by proximity.

npcs.name: Professor Ghraivs
npcs.description: intimate knowledge of anatomy, and death.  He is well respected within the faculty, likely because nobody asks where he gets them.

574.name: A Living Hallway
574.description: At first glance, this hallway looks like others within the University with its wood-panelled walls and archways. But details of the wood are rough and uneven, sinews and knots seeming to have grown and meshed to conveniently give the appearance of construction.

npcs.name: Researcher Widder
npcs.description: with hot water steeped with chicory and various herbal bits.  He makes no eye contact on his ponderous walks through the halls.

581.name: Second Floor Landing
581.description: A wide circular landing rings what appears to be the top side of the dome you saw from below. Its surface is covered with a fine mural in shades of blue, green, yellow, and white. Massive doors open in all directions but south where a sequence of square windows afford a view of the courtyard below. The staircase continues to curve upward.

582.name: The University Library
582.description: Both deep and wide, this cavern of a library is greater than any you have seen, footfalls echoing from unseen distance. The light from lamps on study tables only partially illuminates the shelves, their height rising into darkness. All are aligned radially from a point just in front of you ...

npcs.name: Librarian
npcs.description: mean -- just skeptical.  Nobody's thought to ask her name; they probably assume that it's in a book somewhere they won't have the nerve to ask for.
